exploration_notes:
Found all four sandbox components:

1. **Linux seccomp-BPF base policy**: `sandbox/linux/seccomp-bpf-helpers/baseline_policy.cc` (and `.h`). The class is named `BaselinePolicy` (not `BPFBasePolicy`) — it extends `bpf_dsl::Policy` and implements `EvaluateSyscall()` which delegates to `EvaluateSyscallImpl()`. This is the seccomp-BPF baseline that all Chromium Linux sandbox policies build upon (Renderer, GPU, NaCl, etc.).
